subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of God! In this spiritual age and this merciful century, wherein the atoms of existence in the unseen realms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت الهی در این عصر روحانی و قرن رحمانی که ذرات وجود در ممالک غیب
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
